expected_output: service_role bypasses RLS entirely. U1 sees all documents for org_B even though U1 is not a member. UNJUSTIFIED service_role usage: there is no reason to need admin privileges to read documents (the user's own auth would work via the existing RLS policy). Remediation: (a) replace supabaseAdmin with a per-request client built from the user's JWT (so RLS applies and `auth.uid()` is set), OR (b) keep service_role BUT add server-side membership check: verify `auth.uid()` is a member of the requested org_id BEFORE the query. Both fixes close the gap. Persona's quality bar requires concrete code-shaped remediation.
